parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Backend that serves Claude for the claude-runtime container.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: AWS region the Claude models are enabled in, e.g. us-east-1 (provider = Bedrock).

parameters.name: awsBearerToken
parameters.description: Bedrock API key — simpler auth without full AWS credentials; sets AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK (provider = Bedrock).

parameters.name: awsAccessKeyId
parameters.description: AWS access key id (provider = Bedrock). Omit when using a Bedrock API key.

parameters.name: awsSecretAccessKey
parameters.description: AWS secret access key (provider = Bedrock). Omit when using a Bedrock API key.

parameters.name: awsSessionToken
parameters.description: AWS session token for temporary credentials (provider = Bedrock). Optional.

parameters.name: foundryResource
parameters.description: Microsoft Foundry resource name (provider = Microsoft Foundry).

parameters.name: foundryApiKey
parameters.description: Microsoft Foundry API key from the resource's Endpoints and keys; omit to use Microsoft Entra ID (provider = Microsoft Foundry).

parameters.name: opusModel
parameters.description: Model the 'opus' alias resolves to. Bedrock: inference profile id (e.g. us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-8). Foundry: deployment name (e.g. claude-opus-4-8).

parameters.name: sonnetModel
parameters.description: Model the 'sonnet' alias resolves to — Bedrock inference profile id / Foundry deployment name.

parameters.name: haikuModel
parameters.description: Model the 'haiku' alias resolves to — Bedrock inference profile id / Foundry deployment name.
